prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东北师范大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约15067名、14994名、33965名（2023年物化组出现断档异常）、14281名、15514名。剔除2023年异常值后，正常年份位次集中在14281–15514区间，2025年基准位次约15514名，较2024年后移约1233名，呈小幅后移趋势；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021年11人、2022年11人、2023年11人、2024年9人、2025年11人；2026年计划增至14人，较2025年扩招约27.3%。扩招意味着录取名额增加，在考生规模不变时本应降低竞争难度，但需结合考生总数变化综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为教育部直属211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第48名，近年排名稳定在44–53区间，属于中上游211院校。作为六所部属师范大学之一，在师范教育领域具有显著品牌效应；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于该校硕士报考热度高（2026年拟招硕士3100人，报考人数预估突破1.5万），反映出教育学领域的持续高人气。抖音热度总排名第67位（一般），2024年曾达高热，整体关注度中等偏上。未见明显投档断档或负面舆情记录；第五轮学科评估中，东北师范大学拥有马克思主义理论A+、教育学A+、世界史A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-共6个A-及以上学科，学科实力在211高校中位居前列。招生专业中生物科学类对应生物学A-，汉语言文学（师范类）对应中国语言文学（未单独评级但底蕴深厚），物理学类对应物理学（未单独评级）。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度2022年曾达"推荐"（明显升温），2023–2024年转为"分化观望"，整体趋于平稳但仍有稳定需求。上海市2026年高考总考生约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35.4%，考生规模大幅扩大将显著加剧各校录取竞争。；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，在上海市招生占比极小（约0.7%–0.8%），属于跨省招生。上海考生对本地及长三角高校偏好较强，外地师范类院校在沪吸引力相对有限，但部属师范大学的品牌效应可部分抵消地域劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15514名、2026年扩招约27%（计划从11人增至14人）以及上海市考生总数大幅增长约35%三大核心因素：扩招使位次数字增大（竞争加剧），考生总数大幅增长进一步推高竞争烈度，两者叠加效应显著。声誉偏正面和师范类专业的稳定需求对位次有轻微上移作用。预测2026年最低录取位次约18252名，较2025年后移约2738名。位次区间17752–18752名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 物理学类（含物理学（师范）、电子信息科学与技术、材料物理专业）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学（师范）、生物技术专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 汉语言文学（师范类）
- 经济学类（含金融学、会计学、人力资源管理、市场营销专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 德语（师范类）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约18252名，区间17752–18752名。位次在区间下限（17752名以内）可重点冲刺一档物理学类、生物科学类专业；位次在区间中段（约18252名）以二档汉语言文学、经济学类为主力填报；位次在区间上限（18752名附近）建议以三档德语作为保底选择。东北师范大学作为部属211师范院校，学科实力突出，适合有志于教育行业或基础学科发展的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northeast Normal University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 15067, 14994, 33965 (an anomaly in 2023 for the Physics-Chemistry group), 14281, and 15514. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, normal year rankings are concentrated in the 14281–15514 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15514, which is approximately 1233 places lower than 2024, showing a slight downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Shanghai's comprehensive category: 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 14, an expansion of about 27.3% compared to 2025. Expansion means more admission slots, which should reduce competition difficulty if the number of candidates remains unchanged, but this needs to be assessed in conjunction with changes in the total number of candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. It ranks 48th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 44–53 range in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. As one of the six directly affiliated normal universities, it has a significant brand effect in the field of teacher education. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its master's programs (in 2026, it plans to recruit 3100 master's students, with an estimated number of applicants exceeding 15,000), reflecting sustained high interest in the field of education. Its overall popularity on Douyin ranks 67th (average), with a peak in 2024, indicating moderate to high overall attention. No obvious admission anomalies or negative public records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Northeast Normal University has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, and Biology A-, placing its disciplinary strength among the top of 211 universities. Among its admission majors, Biological Sciences corresponds to Biology A-, Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature (not individually rated but with deep heritage), and Physics corresponds to Physics (not individually rated).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher training/education majors reached 'recommended' (significantly warming) in 2022, turned to 'divergent observation' in 2023–2024, and overall has stabilized but still has steady demand. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam candidates in Shanghai is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025. This significant expansion in the candidate pool will markedly intensify competition for admission across all universities. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, and its enrollment share in Shanghai is very small (about 0.7%–0.8%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Shanghai candidates have a strong preference for local and Yangtze River Delta universities, so the appeal of out-of-province normal universities in Shanghai is relatively limited, but the brand effect of a directly affiliated normal university can partially offset the geographical disadvantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three core factors: the 2025 baseline ranking of 15514, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 27% (plan increasing from 11 to 14), and the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of candidates in Shanghai: the expansion causes the ranking number to increase (competition intensifies), and the large increase in the total number of candidates further pushes up competition intensity, with a significant combined effect. The slightly positive reputation and stable demand for teacher training majors have a slight upward effect on rankings. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 18252, which is about 2738 places lower than 2025. The ranking range is 17752–18752.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Physics (including Physics (Teacher Training), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Sciences (Teacher Training), Biotechnology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training)
- Economics (including Finance, Accounting, Human Resource Management, Marketing)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 18252, with a range of 17752–18752. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 17752) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Physics and Biological Sciences. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 18252) should primarily apply for Tier 2 majors like Chinese Language and Literature and Economics. Candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (around 18752) are advised to choose Tier 3 German as a safe option. As a directly affiliated 211 normal university under the Ministry of Education, Northeast Normal University has outstanding disciplinary strength, making it suitable for candidates aspiring to careers in education or basic disciplines.
